US Stock Impact | Baseline STCRI 0.2300 NORMAL
STABLECOIN DEPEG TRANSMISSION LOGIC: A major stablecoin depeg (>10%) triggers mass redemption panic, exchange outflows, BTC/ETH forced selling, and correlation spike (KC_02). COIN, MSTR, MARA, RIOT are the primary TradFi-listed stocks with direct crypto exposure. JPM and GS have indirect exposure via prime brokerage and crypto custody desks. GLD and TLT receive flight-to-quality capital.
PYUSD SPECIAL NOTE: PayPal (PYPL) launched PYUSD stablecoin in 2023. A USDT depeg scenario creates collateral PYUSD confidence questions — PYPL carries elevated stablecoin_peg_channel sensitivity (0.75) relative to peers. This is an INVERSE BEARISH dynamic: a competitor's peg failure damages PYUSD user confidence.

Coinbase GlobalCOIN ↓ BEARISH exchange_solvency_channel 0.92 Largest public crypto exchange — direct STCRI barometer
MicroStrategyMSTR ↓ BEARISH crypto_equity_correlation_channel 0.90 Leveraged BTC proxy — 3–5x BTC drawdown on crisis

Riot PlatformsRIOT ↓ BEARISH crypto_equity_correlation_channel 0.86 BTC miner — same margin squeeze dynamics as MARA

The KC_01 Depeg Cascade: A USDT depeg >10% is the STCRI nuclear scenario. Historical precedent: LUNA/UST depeg (May 2022) destroyed $40B in 72h, crashed BTC 40%, spiked BTC-SPX correlation to 0.92, and triggered exchange outflows. KC_01 single-trigger design reflects this — a >10% depeg in USDT ($120B) or USDC ($40B) would immediately floor STCRI at 0.85 CRITICAL regardless of all other signals.
Q3 2026 Outlook — Crypto & Stablecoin Signal Calendar
Three conditions that would escalate STCRI from NORMAL to WATCH:
🔴 BTC-SPX 30d correlation rises above 0.70 sustained for >2 weeks (KC_02 approach)
🔴 Any top-10 exchange reports >$5B in unusual withdrawal volumes in 48h (KC_03 approach)
🔴 USDT or USDC depegs >3% for >24 hours (KC_01 pre-warning)
Any single condition crossing → STCRI trajectory shift to WATCH zone.

Key STCRI Insight — Stablecoin as Shadow Money Supply:
USDT + USDC total $160B represents approximately 0.7% of M2 money supply but 12% of daily Forex settlement volume. A depeg is not just a crypto event — it is a shadow banking liquidity event. When STCRI fires KC_01, the transmission runs: crypto sell-off → exchange bank-run → TradFi counterparty losses → SHADOW_BANKING_NBFI alert. This is why STCRI sits in Batch 8 alongside NBFI.

Supply Chain Risk Intelligence
Chokepoint · Freight Rate · Critical Minerals · Nearshoring · Logistics
SCRI  0.1300  NORMAL

Stablecoin Crypto Risk Canary operates an advanced, deeply integrated supply chain network with deep logistics infrastructure, multiple port redundancies, and sophisticated inventory management — reducing but not eliminating chokepoint sensitivity. No major maritime chokepoint exposure identified in structural config.

Critical import dependencies include USD reserve backing, T-bill collateral, regulatory clarity.

Primary exports — stablecoin instruments, DeFi protocols, crypto exchanges — are sensitive to global freight rate movements and trade route disruptions.

SCRI 0.1300 NORMAL — Supply chain channels are operating within baseline parameters. No structural disruption signals active at this time.

Watch signals: SCFI/WCI/BDI freight index spike above 2-standard-deviation threshold → freight stress trigger

Real Estate Risk Intelligence
Property Price · Mortgage Stress · Commercial RE · Developer Debt · REIT
RERI  0.1000  NORMAL

Stablecoin Crypto Risk Canary is classified as a developed real estate market. Primary stress vector is stablecoin depeg event, crypto-equity correlation contagion, and exchange solvency risk. Commercial real estate exposure is limited CRE concentration risk.

As a developed market, property values are sensitive to interest rate cycles — the aggressive central bank tightening of 2022-2024 has left mortgage holders with elevated refinancing risk. Commercial office markets face structural headwinds from remote work adoption globally.

No active developer stress flagged. Property developers in are not currently assessed as in distress at a systemic level.

RERI 0.1000 NORMAL — Property market stable at structural baseline. No systemic stress indicators active.

Watch signals: Mortgage refinancing cliff (2025-2027 vintage) → household stress spike  |  Property price index 3-month decline exceeding 2% → KC_RE01 trigger

Insurance Risk Intelligence
Natural Catastrophe · Reinsurance · Property Withdrawal · Financial Guaranty · Climate
INRI  0.1300  NORMAL

No primary natural catastrophe perils identified in the structural config for .

The insurance market in is minimal, with negligible domestic insurance infrastructure — catastrophic events rely almost entirely on international reinsurance or sovereign guarantees. Reinsurance profile: low reinsurance dependency — domestic capacity absorbs most shock.

Climate risk classification: Tier 1 — limited long-horizon climate exposure. Limited near-term climate-driven insurance market disruption expected at current trajectory.

INRI 0.1300 NORMAL — Insurance market operating within baseline parameters. No structural stress active.

Watch signals: Sovereign disaster declaration without insurance backstop → fiscal cliff  |  Cat bond spread widening → forward signal of reinsurance market stress
